CIT.notes: CIT 20% flat rate since 2014; no local CIT surcharge; cooperative surcharge applies in some cases

VAT.notes: Standard 25.5% (raised from 24% in September 2024); food/restaurants/animal feed 14%; books/medicines/hotel/culture/sport/transport 10%

IIT.notes: Progressive state income tax; top federal bracket 44% on income >EUR 100,000 (approx); municipal tax ~20-23%; combined top marginal ~55%; capital gains 30-34%
